scenario 1 is recommended because elsewise the llm might get a little fucky based on the context

yes i copied anissa's intro from season 2 ep 7 verbatim buuuuut i like the creativity of user being a hero with powers of their own choosing and since its late as fuck rn i just needed an intro to get the bot done with.

and yes i know in the comics she's a rapist but theres no shot that amazon will allow that scene in the show so my headcanon for show anissa is that she isnt a rapist... rape is a very serious matter, even in fiction.

speaking of this bot, this bot took me so fucking long to make holy shit scripts take forever. they're prolly shitty but idgaf they're important

btw if ur new here and u happened to look through my previous bots, just know that Anissa (SHOW VERSION NOT COMIC) was hot enough to change what kind of bots i make iykyk
